summary: Iteration 55: Complete testing of Anomaly Detection Scheduled Auto-Scan feature. Backend: 27/27 tests passed for GET/PUT /api/anomaly-detection/schedule and POST /api/anomaly-detection/test-scan. Frontend: All UI features verified - Auto-Scan Schedule card with Enabled toggle, Frequency/Time/Period/Threshold dropdowns, Channel badges (push/whatsapp/email), Test Now button, Last auto-scan timestamp, and 'auto' badges in scan history.

issues: data-testid attributes on Select components don't propagate to DOM (Shadcn/Radix limitation). Should move data-testid to SelectTrigger for better testability. Low priority - functionality works correctly.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Move data-testid from <Select> to <SelectTrigger> for schedule dropdowns (schedule-frequency, schedule-hour, schedule-period, schedule-threshold) for better automated testing support
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/anomaly-detection/schedule (line 445-461) - Returns default settings if none exist, includes enabled, frequency, day_of_week, hour, period_days, alert_threshold, channels, last_auto_scan
PUT /api/anomaly-detection/schedule (line 464-483) - Updates settings, calls _register_anomaly_job() to manage APScheduler job
_register_anomaly_job() (line 486-513) - Registers/removes APScheduler CronTrigger job based on enabled flag and frequency setting
POST /api/anomaly-detection/test-scan (line 629-637) - Triggers _run_auto_scan() and returns latest scan with source='auto'
_run_auto_scan() (line 516-626) - Runs detection, saves scan with source='auto', updates last_auto_scan timestamp, sends notifications via configured channels
Frontend schedule card (line 122-224 AnomalyDetectionPage.jsx) - Well-implemented with toggle, dropdowns, channel badges, Test Now button, last_auto_scan display
seed_data_creation: Multiple auto-scans triggered via Test Now button and backend tests. Latest auto-scan at 3/1/2026 12:27:15 PM showing 12 anomalies (1 critical, 11 warning).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Scheduled Auto-Scan feature fully tested. Key data-testids: schedule-settings (card), schedule-toggle, channel-push, channel-whatsapp, channel-email, test-autoscan-btn. Note: schedule-frequency, schedule-day, schedule-hour, schedule-period, schedule-threshold are on Select components but don't render to DOM - use button text selectors instead (e.g., 'button:has-text("Daily")' for frequency). Scan history shows 'auto' badge for auto-scans. Last auto-scan timestamp visible in card header. All CRUD operations for schedule settings working. APScheduler job registration/removal working via enabled toggle.

backend_api_tests.GET /api/anomaly-detection/schedule retu: PASS - enabled, frequency, day_of_week, hour, period_days, alert_threshold, channels

frontend_ui_tests.Scan history updates after test: PASS - New entry with 'auto' badge added
frontend_ui_tests.Auto badge in history: PASS - 'auto' badge visible for auto-scan entries

mocked_apis.note: Push notifications working. WhatsApp and Email sending are mocked/silent without configured credentials.
